summary: Token Expiry & Dark Cosmic Theme Testing Complete - All features working. Backend: 18/18 tests passed. Login flows work for all roles (Super Admin, HOD, Teacher, Student) with correct expiresAt field returned. Token expiry middleware correctly returns 401 with SESSION_EXPIRED code for expired tokens. Role-based TTL working (Student=3h, others=24h). Frontend: Dark cosmic theme with glassmorphism applied correctly across all pages. No white backgrounds found. Tab navigation on HOD dashboard works (Review Questions, Blueprint Manager, Generate Paper, Send for Approval). Sidebar navigation works across all pages (Blueprints, Coverage, Dashboard). Sign out functionality working.
critical_code_review_comments: Token expiry implementation is correct: session-config.ts defines role-based TTLs (student=3h, others=24h)
Auth middleware (auth.ts) correctly extracts token timestamp and validates against role-based TTL
pg-storage.ts authenticateUser returns expiresAt field calculated from role TTL
Frontend auth.tsx correctly stores expiresAt in localStorage and checks expiry on interval
queryClient.ts correctly handles 401 SESSION_EXPIRED responses and redirects to login
Card component has proper glassmorphism styling (bg-white/[0.04] backdrop-blur-xl border-white/[0.08])
All login form elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Token expiry feature fully implemented and tested. All login flows working with correct expiresAt field. Dark cosmic theme with glassmorphism applied to all Shadcn components (Card, Tabs, Dialog, Select). HOD dashboard has 4 tabs: Review Questions, Blueprint Manager, Generate Paper, Send for Approval. Sidebar navigation working for all roles. Student has limited sidebar (Dashboard, Mock Tests). Teacher has limited sidebar (Dashboard, Upload, Mock Tests). Super Admin redirects to /superadmin with full admin control center.

dark_cosmic_theme.white_backgrounds: None found - dark theme applied correctly
